title: quercus × rosacea
intro: Quercus × rosacea, also known as the Oak-leaved hybrid, is a rare hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Quercus robur (English Oak) and Quercus petraea (Sessile Oak). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Quercus × rosacea offers various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
